_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Grafana
author: sinaloensemel@gmail.com

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Grafana Installation Script
#

apt-get update
apt-get install --no-install-recommends -y ca-certificates wget

# Download configs in a tmp folder
mkdir -p /mnt/server/ZtMCQm/
rm -Rf /mnt/server/ZtMCQm/*
cd /mnt/server/ZtMCQm/

# Download Prometheus
wget https://dl.grafana.com/grafana/release/12.4.1/grafana_12.4.1_22846628243_linux_amd64.tar.gz
tar -zxvf grafana_12.4.1_22846628243_linux_amd64.tar.gz
cp grafana-12.4.1/conf/sample.ini grafana-12.4.1/conf/grafana.ini

# Replace grafana.ini
sed -i "s#^;http_port = 3000#http_port = $SERVER_PORT#" /mnt/server/ZtMCQm/grafana-12.4.1/conf/grafana.ini

# Put config in server
yes | cp -avr grafana-12.4.1/* /mnt/server/

# Delete tmp folder
cd /mnt/server/
rm -Rf ZtMCQm/
